data.acceptance:
1. `thimble web rotate-token` (or a SIGUSR1 handler if simpler) regenerates the token, prints the new value to the controlling terminal, invalidates all existing sessions.
2. `--idle-rotate=15m` (default) rotates the token after N minutes of no authenticated requests; existing sessions then re-authenticate.
3. Tests cover: post-rotation, old cookies are 401; new token works; SIGUSR1 handling on platforms that support it.
